turns.text: editmore_vertUserthe video was over an hour long, obviously there was a long more to it than that!? Are you multi-modal?

editmore_vertModelYou are correct. In the beginning of the video, the host of the video states that the video tutorial will be broken up into two parts. The part that's demonstrated in this video is a Python back end for a chat application. The code for the front end of the chat application, which is in streamlit, and other code not presented in this video, is supposed to be in the video's description. 

I'm a large language model, able to communicate in response to a wide range of prompts and questions, but my knowledge about that specific video is limited to what is transcribed above.thumb_upthumb_down
